description: Topping every teen's wardrobe wish-list, this striking pair of sandals is the right choice for the summer with its understated, pastel hues and slim, gladiator style straps loooing elegantly around your foot. enroute's Spring Summer collection comes up with this versatile piece - a definite eye candy, which looks enviously good with ethnic and casual western wear!UpperLeather upper with leather straps at the forefoot, midfoot and ankleZipper at the heel collarLightly padded footbed with a brand patch at the heelFloral details along the upper OutsoleTPU textured outsole with an upraised heelSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
